source_excerpt:
Report of Board Counsel - FYI -SB 1062 - Delivering
4 Better Health Care for our Veterans
5 [Ashley B. Goshert, Esquire, Board Counsel, explained
6 SB 1062 would implement a veteran specific training
7 requirement through continuing education. Physicians
8 and other covered providers would be required to
9 complete the training as part of their existing
10 licensure or renewal requirements. She noted the
11 bill was currently with the Senate Health and Human
12 Services Committee.]

correct_facts.subject: Would require physicians and other covered providers to complete veteran-specific training through continuing education as part of licensure or renewal.
correct_facts.status_note: Reported FYI; bill was with the Senate Health and Human Services Committee.
correct_facts.quote:
She noted the
11 bill was currently with the Senate Health and Human
12 Services Committee.

commentary: involvement='monitoring' because Board Counsel reported the bill 'FYI' and only noted its committee status; the board took no supporting, opposing, or testifying action. bill_state='PA'; topic='CME' (a CE requirement).
